description: Define license JWT claim schema (iss, sub, cust, tier, seats?, iat, exp) and document the ES256/P-256 token shape.

description: Add license token TypeScript types to packages/licensing (LicenseClaims, LicenseTier = 'pro'|'premium').

description: Implement verifyLicense(token) in packages/licensing using jsonwebtoken (ES256) returning { valid, claims, reason }.
prdRefs: Requirements > Functional Requirements > FR2 — Verification module

description: verifyLicense validates exp/iat (with small clock skew) and maps failures to stable reason codes (expired, bad_signature, unknown_kid, malformed).
prdRefs: Requirements > Functional Requirements > FR2 — Verification module

description: verifyLicense selects the verifying public key by JWT header kid.
prdRefs: Requirements > Functional Requirements > FR2 — Verification module

description: Embed a checked-in public-key registry (kid -> PEM) in packages/licensing; no secret material in the build.

description: Support multiple active public keys to enable key rotation without breaking deployed appliances.

description: Signing CLI loads the private key from env/file at runtime and never commits key material.

description: Signing CLI can generate a throwaway test keypair and fixture tokens (valid / expired / wrong-kid / tampered) for tests.

description: Key-management & rotation doc (private-key custody, kid rotation, manual issue/renew procedure).

description: Effective-tier resolution order: valid license -> license.tier; else active trial -> premium; else essentials.

note: Server-side enforcement implemented via eeRuntimeEnabledServer() (isEnterprise && self-host tier != essentials; falls back to isEnterprise on DB error). Applied to calendarActions (11 guards), microsoftActions (getMicrosoftIntegrationStatus), and the AI chat/ai API routes (completions, stream, execute, document-assist). @enterprise platform routes (extensions etc.) are gated by tier-features/product/add-on access, now essentials-aware through assertTierAccess/hasFeature.
